attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects when an attacker or tool disables the  Windows Defender service (WinDefend) via the registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Ján Trenčanský, frack113, AlertIQ, Nasreddine Bencherchali

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Disable Windows Event Logging Via Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects tampering with the "Enabled" registry key in order to disable Windows logging of a Windows event channel

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Change Winevt Channel Access Permission Via Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects tampering with the "ChannelAccess" registry key in order to change access to Windows event channel.
Detects the disabling of the Windows Defender eventlog as seen in relation to Lockbit 3.0 infections
Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts, including those that may be vulnerable to remote software exploitation

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: DNS Server Discovery Via LDAP Query
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects DNS server discovery via LDAP query requests from uncommon applications

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable
